i had a very spooky experience today...

I said that if the group cleared their ror2 run i would stop propagandizing frost for 67 hours...

as i saw astr carry the 2nd to last stage, i started to think... what if my freedom of speech does truly get suppressed? what if my truth is not allowed to come out of my own mouth, if i drown in them myself?

i realized then that there's something i take for granted - my ability to state what i want; my ability to share my truth (and the objective truth).

i saw the final stage, i saw the boss healthbar go down to 1/2 health. halfway towards tyrannic oppression. but then, there was hope. frost died from being too close to the boss.

alas, it was symbolic hope. frost was icarus, and his sun was the arrogance of not respecting the boss and not respecting the truth. the healthbar started to slow, and there was some sense of hope for what would otherwise appear to be a complete run.

then, tea died, and it was only astr, the last bastion of hope for frost and the last oppressor for i.

astr constantly took shelter and kept far away from the boss. it was looking hopeless for the final lock to break.

but then, the boss seized a quick opportunity and killed astr. it was an exhilarating moment. it was a reminder that truth can and will prevail.

so i stand here in front of all of you. i was almost censored, oppressed, muted for the unfavorable but honest truth. it was a frightening experience. but alas, i can say that i and my free speech survived.

i may continue to say frost is a femboy. i may continue to say frost is tsundere. i may continue to say frost is a furry.

i thank all who have given me strength on this arduous journey, and i encourage all of you to share your own truths as well, before it gets taken away in tyrannical overreach.
